# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Mashujaa Day 2025: Kamariny Stadium Confirmed as Venue](https://zandani.co.ke/article/mashujaa-day-2025-kamariny-stadium) - CS Kipchumba Murkomen confirms Kamariny Stadium will host Mashujaa Day 2025 to boost Elgeyo Marakwet infrastructure. Get the details on this update.
- [Gyökeres Double Fires Dominant Arsenal as Newcastle and Brentford Secure Crucial Wins](https://zandani.co.ke/article/gy-keres-double-fires-dominant-arsenal-as-newcastle-and-brentford-se) - Gyökeres hits a double in a dominant Arsenal display as Newcastle and Brentford pick up crucial wins. Catch all the latest football action here.
- [AFCON 2027 Confirmed: Kenya Awaits Venue Decision](https://zandani.co.ke/article/afcon-2027-dates-kenya) - CAF confirmed AFCON 2027 dates for Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania starting June 19. Fans await news on Nairobi venue slots. Get the details.
- [Francis Atwoli clarifies 12 percent wage increase for workers](https://zandani.co.ke/article/francis-atwoli-wage-increase) - COTU boss Francis Atwoli explains the 12 percent wage increase for all workers and 15 percent for farm earners. Get the details.
- [Confirmed: Bola Tinubu Nairobi Visit for Africa-France Summit](https://zandani.co.ke/article/bola-tinubu-nairobi-visit) - President Bola Tinubu Nairobi visit confirmed for the Africa-France Summit to discuss key continental priorities with Ruto. Get the details.
- [Confirmed: NPSC Dismisses Fake Car Auction Claims in Nairobi](https://zandani.co.ke/article/npsc-car-auction-fake) - The NPSC car auction notice is fake. The Commission warns Kenyans against a viral scam promising cheap vehicles in Nairobi. Get the full details here.
- [How Nationhood Science Will Become Mandatory in Kenyan Schools](https://zandani.co.ke/article/nationhood-science-kenya-bill) - Parliament invites Kenyans to submit views on the Nationhood Science bill affecting all schools to promote national values. Get the details.
- [Andrew Kibe says separate beds improve long-term relationships](https://zandani.co.ke/article/andrew-kibe-separate-beds) - Andrew Kibe claims that couples who sleep in separate beds enjoy better relationships by reducing tension and keeping space. Read the full story
- [Woman consumes Eucharist wine and bread in viral video](https://zandani.co.ke/article/woman-eats-eucharist-video) - A woman sparked a religious debate after a video of her consuming Eucharist wine and bread at home went viral. Read the full story
- [Ipswich Town on Brink of Historic Premier League Return in Championship Final Day Drama](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ipswich-town-on-brink-of-historic-premier-league-return-in-champions) - Ipswich Town are on the verge of a historic Premier League return. Follow the Championship final day drama as the promotion race concludes.
